title: T-060 — UI: TEC-085 Specification Review modal + TEC-086 Specifications List
prompt: Build TEC-085 spec review modal (sign-off) and TEC-086 specifications list per §10A. Match `spec_review_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:460-483 and `specs_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:74-108. Quality-Lead approval workflow: list -> open spec -> review -> sign off. RED tests/ui/tec-085-086-specs.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-085-086-specs.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cross-item specifications list + review modal for sign-off.
pipeline_inputs.details: Sign-off writes audit_log row action='spec.signoff'. Permission: quality_lead role.
acceptance_criteria: Given list and modal render, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:460-483 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:74-108, then list columns and modal field set match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given quality_lead clicks Sign-off, when API returns 200, then modal closes and row status flips to 'signed'.
Given user lacks quality_lead role, when on page, then Sign-off button is disabled.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + RBAC + signoff flow.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass audit on signoff.
